author: mthuret
subject: v4.0.0-beta.1
body: # [4.0.0-beta.1](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/compare/v4.0.0-beta.0...v4.0.0-beta.1) (2017-04-03) ### Bug Fixes * **SFFV:** fix wrong query behaviour with slow network (algolia/react-instantsearch#2086) ([7272b2f](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/commit/7272b2f)), closes [#2086](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/issues/2086)
